name: civicgo
description: Root scripts for running the CivicGO desktop web and mobile apps.

scripts.dev:desktop: concurrently -n backend,desktop -c green,cyan "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:desktop:lan: concurrently -n backend,desktop -c green,cyan "npm run dev:backend:lan" "npm run dev:frontend:lan"
scripts.build:desktop: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.check:desktop: npm run lint:desktop && npm run build:desktop
scripts.restore: npm run restore:desktop && npm run restore:mobile
scripts.restore:desktop: dotnet restore backend/CivicGo.Api.csproj && npm --prefix frontend install
